title: SC II Acquisition prices $150M IPO at $10 per share
content:
* SC II Acquisition (SCIIU [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SCIIU]) priced [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20320669-sc-ii-acquisition-corp-announces-pricing-of-150000-000-initial-public-offering] its IPO of 15M units at a price of $10.00 per unit.
 	* The company’s units will be listed on the Nasdaq under the symbol “SCIIU” and will begin trading on November 26, 2025.
 	* The underwriters have a 45-day option to purchase up to an additional 2.25M units at the IPO price to cover over-allotments, 
 	* Once the securities comprising the units begin separate trading, the Class A ordinary shares and rights are expected to be listed on Nasdaq under the symbols “SCII” and “SCIIR,” respectively.
 	* The closing of the offering is expected to close on November 28, 2025.

MORE ON SC II ACQUISITION CORP.

 	* Seeking Alpha’s Quant Rating on Sc Ii Acquisition Corp. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SCIIU/ratings/quant-ratings]
 	* Financial information for Sc Ii Acquisition Corp. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SCIIU/income-statement]
